name: Disallow DM
description: Blocks direct and group messages between users so conversations happen in channels.

settings.help_text: Message shown to a user when their direct or group message is blocked. Leave blank to use the default.
settings.default: Direct messages are disabled by your administrator.

settings.help_text: Also block group messages (3-7 people), not just 1-to-1 direct messages.
Allow direct/group messages whenever a system administrator is involved (sender or recipient).
Allow a user to send messages to their own direct message channel (personal notes).

Allow posts authored by incoming webhooks (the from_webhook prop) in DMs/GMs. Off by default. SECURITY NOTE: the from_webhook prop can be set by any user via the API unless the server runs Hardened Mode (ExperimentalEnableHardenedMode), so enabling this weakens the block. Bot-owned integrations are always allowed regardless of this setting.
